currency.description: Currency in which refund will be executed as ISO 4217 code (currently available: EUR, PLN)

amount.description:
Amount of created refund in smallest denomination
Example: "100" (1 PLN)

overrefund.description:
If TRUE, refund will be executed no matter if there was any other refunds executed for this transaction earlier. It ignores error 2010.
Default value is FALSE
